title: athyrium woodsioides
intro: Athyrium woodsioides, also known as the Asian lady fern or lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Athyrium woodsioides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
